CREATE TABLE test_uuids (id UUID, description VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_uuids (id, description) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), 'First UUID');
INSERT INTO test_uuids (id, description) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), 'Second UUID');
INSERT INTO test_uuids (id, description) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), 'Third UUID');
SELECT id, description FROM test_uuids WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_uuids WHERE description LIKE 'First%');
SELECT COUNT(*) AS uuid_count FROM test_uuids WHERE id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT gen_random_uuid() AS random_uuid FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy;
SELECT id, (SELECT gen_random_uuid()) AS new_uuid FROM test_uuids;
CREATE TABLE additional_info (uuid UUID, detail VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO additional_info (uuid, detail) SELECT id, 'Details for ' || description FROM test_uuids;
SELECT a.id, b.detail FROM test_uuids AS a JOIN additional_info AS b ON a.id = b.uuid WHERE a.description LIKE 'Second%';
SELECT gen_random_uuid() AS unique_id FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy) LIMIT 5;
CREATE TABLE complex_uuids (uuid UUID, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW());
SELECT uuid, created_at FROM complex_uuids WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day';
